revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguЕҸk 14 hГҙМӨ (nГ№ng-lДӯk)]][[ja:1жңҲ14ж—Ҙ (ж—§жҡҰ)]][[ko:мқҢл Ҙ 1мӣ” 14мқј]][[zh-min-nan:1 goeМҚh 14 jiМҚt (kЕ«-leМҚk)]][[zh-yue:жӯЈжңҲеҚҒеӣӣ]][[zh:жӯЈжңҲеҚҒеӣӣ]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 14|qq=January 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=дёҖжңҲеҚҒеӣӣ|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=мқҢл Ҙ 1мӣ” 14мқј|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}} in the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|ж—§жҡҰ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|RokuyЕҚ|ja|е…ӯжӣң|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/RokuyЕҚ|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|еҸӢеј•|1=RokuyЕҚ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to е…ӯжӣң|1=RokuyЕҚ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor KЕҚgen|en|Emperor KЕҚgen|qid=Q333572|lt=Emperor KЕҚgen|1=Emperor KЕҚgen}} 1st yearпјҲ{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|214 BC|en|214 BC|qid=Q80210|lt=214 BC|1=214 BC}} {{ill|February 21|en|February 21|qid=Q2350|lt=February 21|1=February 21}}пјү вҖ“ Traditional date of the enthronement of Emperor KЕҚgen, the 8th Emperor of Japan. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 6th yearпјҲ{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} {{ill|February 21|en|February 21|qid=Q2350|lt=February 21|1=February 21}}пјү вҖ“ The kabuki play гҖҺ{{ill|Yowa Nasake Ukina no Yokogushi|ja|дёҺи©ұжғ…жө®еҗҚжЁӘж«ӣ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yowa Nasake Ukina no Yokogushi|1=Yowa Nasake Ukina no Yokogushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11361931}}гҖҸ premieres at the Nakamura-za theatre in Edo.
== Births == * {{ill|KeichЕҚ|en|KeichЕҚ|qid=Q1328185|lt=KeichЕҚ|1=KeichЕҚ}} 7th yearпјҲ{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1602|en|1602|qid=Q6727|lt=1602|1=1602}} {{ill|March 7|en|March 7|qid=Q2394|lt=March 7|1=March 7}}пјү вҖ“ {{ill|KanЕҚ Tan'yЕ«|en|KanЕҚ Tan'yЕ«|qid=Q961405|lt=KanЕҚ Tan'yЕ«|1=KanЕҚ Tan'yЕ«}}, painter of the KanЕҚ school (d. {{ill|1674|en|1674|qid=Q7620|lt=1674|1=1674}}). * {{ill|TenpЕҚ|en|TenpЕҚ|qid=Q1369045|lt=TenpЕҚ|1=TenpЕҚ}} 14th yearпјҲ{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1843|en|1843|qid=Q7629|lt=1843|1=1843}} {{ill|February 12|en|February 12|qid=Q2336|lt=February 12|1=February 12}}пјү вҖ“ {{ill|Joseph Hardy Neesima|en|Joseph Hardy Neesima|qid=Q905142|lt=Niijima JЕҚ|1=Joseph Hardy Neesima}}, Christian educator and founder of DЕҚshisha University (d. {{ill|1890|en|1890|qid=Q7832|lt=1890|1=1890}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor IngyЕҚ|en|Emperor IngyЕҚ|qid=Q349258|lt=Emperor IngyЕҚ|1=Emperor IngyЕҚ}} 42nd yearпјҲ{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|453|en|453|qid=Q30269|lt=453|1=453}} {{ill|February 8|en|February 8|qid=Q2323|lt=February 8|1=February 8}}пјү вҖ“ Death of Emperor IngyЕҚ, 19th Emperor of Japan . * {{ill|YЕҚwa|en|YЕҚwa|qid=Q729609|lt=YЕҚwa|1=YЕҚwa}} 1st yearпјҲ{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1181|en|1181|qid=Q19704|lt=1181|1=1181}} {{ill|January 30|en|January 30|qid=Q2287|lt=January 30|1=January 30}}пјү вҖ“ Death of {{ill|Emperor Takakura|en|Emperor Takakura|qid=Q357261|lt=Emperor Takakura|1=Emperor Takakura}}, 80th Emperor of Japan (b. {{ill|1161|en|1161|qid=Q19664|lt=1161|1=1161}}). * {{ill|Daoguang era|zh|йҒ“е…ү|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daoguang era|qq=}} 30th yearпјҲ{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1850|en|1850|qid=Q7653|lt=1850|1=1850}} {{ill|February 25|en|February 25|qid=Q2356|lt=February 25|1=February 25}}пјү вҖ“ Death of the Daoguang Emperor, 8th emperor of the Qing dynasty (b. {{ill|1782|en|1782|qid=Q7740|lt=1782|1=1782}}). * {{ill|KeiЕҚ|en|KeiЕҚ|qid=Q776775|lt=KeiЕҚ|1=KeiЕҚ}} 2nd yearпјҲ{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|February 28|en|February 28|qid=Q2362|lt=February 28|1=February 28}}пјү вҖ“ {{ill|Takashima ShЕ«han|en|Takashima ShЕ«han|qid=Q7677398|lt=Takashima ShЕ«han|1=Takashima ShЕ«han}}, artillery expert and early modernizer (b. {{ill|1798|en|1798|qid=Q7823|lt=1798|1=1798}}).
== Commemorations == * йЈҫзҙҚ (Shimenawa removal) * еҚҒеӣӣж—Ҙе№ҙи¶ҠгҒ— ("14th Eve" вҖ“ pre-Lunar New Year observance) * {{ill|Kuzu no Koso|ja|еӣҪж –еҘҸ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuzu no Koso|1=kuzusou|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17228330}} (ritual performance at {{ill|Yoshino, Nara|en|Yoshino, Nara|qid=Q1203731|lt=Yoshino, Nara|1=Yoshino, Nara}}, Nara)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|13|1|15|12|14|2|1|0114|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
